label: CU loop • drag one element onto another
query: Drag the Draft card onto the Archive bin.
notes: Deterministic (scripted-model) case for the drag verb: the loop must resolve BOTH the start (`target`) and destination (`to`) elements and issue a single coordinate drag between their centers. The scripted world records the drag in its verb trace (a drag has no value side effect here), so this proves the two-endpoint wiring rather than a state mutation.
